title: Manufacturing / Process Engineer (Powder Injection & Sintering)
description:
Location: Singapore

Industry: Precision Manufacturing | Medical & Automotive Components

About the Opportunity

A precision manufacturing company specialising in powder injection molding (PIM) and sintering processes

is expanding its engineering team to support growing production demands across

medical-grade and automotivecomponents.

The organisation manufactures high-precision, high-volume metal parts where process control, consistency, and quality compliance are critical. This role sits close to the production floor and plays a key role in driving process stability, yield improvement, and continuous improvement initiatives.

Key Responsibilities

  • Support and optimise powder injection molding (PIM) and sintering processes for metal components
  • Monitor and improve process parameters, cycle times, and production yield
  • Troubleshoot manufacturing issues related to molding, debinding, sintering, and post-processing
  • Work closely with Production, Quality, and Maintenance teams to ensure stable and repeatable processes
  • Support new product introduction (NPI) from pilot runs through to mass production
  • Assist with process documentation, SOPs, and manufacturing instructions
  • Participate in continuous improvement initiatives (yield, scrap reduction, process capability)
  • Ensure manufacturing processes comply with quality and regulatory requirements, particularly for medical components

Requirements

  • Diploma or Degree in Mechanical Engineering, Materials Engineering, Manufacturing Engineering, or related field
  • Hands-on experience in powder metallurgy, powder injection molding (PIM), sintering, or similar precision manufacturing processes
  • Experience in medical device or automotive manufacturing environments is highly preferred
  • Strong understanding of process control, root cause analysis, and production troubleshooting
  • Comfortable working in a shopfloor-centric, hands-on environment
  • Able to collaborate across engineering, production, and quality teams
  • Familiarity with ISO / quality-regulated environments is an advantage

Why This Role

  • Exposure to advanced manufacturing technologies used in medical and automotive industries
  • Opportunity to work on high-precision components with real-world impact
  • Stable manufacturing environment with long-term production programs
  • Strong emphasis on process mastery and engineering fundamentals

Everything the market needs, we've got it covered. All your hiring needs in one place.


From permanent, interim and contract recruitment to executive searches, our suite of services and expertise has helped many companies of all sizes hire with confidence the best they need, when they need it.


With strategically located headquarters springing up in Singapore overlooking the Asia Pacific, you can be assured our area of coverage, expertise and the people in our network has always extended beyond the shores of Singapore spanning across the entire Asia Pacific, ensuring our clients and candidates receive the best service, advice and results, always.
